name: daekeun-ml-plugins
description: AWS ML infrastructure & VLM/LLM research toolkits for Claude Code (skills, subagents, rules).

plugins.name: aws-sagemaker-toolkit
plugins.description: AWS ML infra assets across EC2/HyperPod/SageMaker tiers: platform selection, SageMaker deep-dive, E2E fine-tuning generator, hands-on lab code, and author/verify/lab-code subagents.

plugins.name: ml-research-toolkit
plugins.description: VLM/LLM research pipeline: idea/literature, experiment & ablation design, compute planning, training diagnostics, eval analysis, interpretability, paper writing, rebuttals. 21 skills + 12 subagents.
